title: COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE - 211info
text: TRANSITION HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-affirming healthcare and health education to queer, transgender, and intersex communities. Services include hormone therapy, electrolysis, and body image resurces, as well as assistance with name and indentification changes. 1590 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 357-7594 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 357-7594 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete online intake form. Call or text for more information. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: No standard hours. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lane Transit District bus line #24 Services: General Medical Care * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Name/Personal Information Modification Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Body Image Resources Transgender Hormone Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRANSITION HEALTH
